# Tasks: Admin Mode Flows (Spec 009)

**Branch**: `009-admin-mode-flows` | **Date**: 2026-05-15
**Spec**: [spec.md](./spec.md) | **Plan**: [plan.md](./plan.md) | **Data model**: [data-model.md](./data-model.md) | **Contracts**: [contracts/](./contracts/) | **Research**: [research.md](./research.md)
**Generated by**: `speckit-tasks` after `speckit-plan` (Constitution Check 8/8 PASS).

---

## Overview

**~108 задач в 14 фазах** (extends спека 008's 85-task structure). Каждая задача:
- Привязана к FR / NFR / FR-A11Y / US / Plan section / контракту.
- Имеет explicit acceptance (named test, measurable manual check, или compile gate).
- Указывает файл(ы), которые создаёт/меняет — никогда не более 5 на одну задачу.
- Зависимости (`Dependencies: requires T0NN`) — only backward refs (T020 → T012, never T012 → T020).

**Total estimate**: ~8 недель (consistent с plan.md §10 rollout 8 phases, размер принят пользователем). Critical path: Phase 0 → 1 → 3 → 5 → 8 → 9. Phase 7 (health UI), Phase 12 (OpenApp) могут идти параллельно после Phase 5.

**Markers legend**:
- `[P]` — parallel-safe (разные файлы, no shared state с другими `[P]` в той же фазе).
- `[CRIT]` — критический путь / gate перед следующей фазой.
- `[M]` — manual step (требует ручного действия пользователя — coordination, smoke walkthrough).
- `[BLOCKED:TNNN]` — task ждёт другую конкретную задачу (BLOCKED — strong gate, dependency — weak ordering hint).

**Per CLAUDE.md §Branching**: «open PR as soon as branch has reviewable first commit; keep pushing as work progresses». Phase 0 закрывается первым push'ем на ветку 009; PR открывается параллельно.

- **Dependencies**: requires T016.

## Phase 5 — Real adapters (androidMain)

**Goal**: Production-grade adapters wrapping Android-specific SDKs per CLAUDE.md rule 2 ACL. Никаких vendor типов в return signatures.

### T060 [P] [CRIT] Implement `VCardImportAdapter` (hand-written parser ~100 LOC)

- **Trace**: FR-028, plan.md §5 (NO ezvcard library), NFR-002 (linear-time parser).
- **Acceptance**: `class VCardImportAdapter : VCardImporter` в `core/src/androidMain/kotlin/com/launcher/adapters/contacts/VCardImportAdapter.kt`. Линейный parser (single pass через lines, NO greedy regex; defensively bounded loops). Extracts FN + TEL only. 10KB limit before UTF-8 decode. UTF-8 strict (throws on invalid sequences → returns NonUtf8). VCardAdapterContractTest (T042) extended to run против real adapter — все 5 samples pass.
- **Files**: `core/src/androidMain/kotlin/com/launcher/adapters/contacts/VCardImportAdapter.kt`.
- **Dependencies**: requires T018.

### T061 [P] Test: `VCardParserLinearTimeTest` (NFR-002 protection — no regex backtracking)

- **Trace**: NFR-002, plan.md §6 (microbenchmark).
- **Acceptance**: feed pathological payload (10KB of `BEGIN:VCARD\n` repeated, `TEL:` lines with unusual chars) → assert parse completes within 200ms wall-clock on JVM (not full microbenchmark, just safety net). Real microbenchmark — T108.
- **Files**: `core/src/androidUnitTest/kotlin/com/launcher/adapters/contacts/VCardParserLinearTimeTest.kt`.
- **Dependencies**: requires T060.

### T062 [P] Implement `SystemContactPickerAdapter` (ActivityResultContract.PickContact)

- **Trace**: FR-024, FR-026, plan.md §2 ACL.
- **Acceptance**: `class SystemContactPickerAdapter(private val activityResultLauncher: ...) : SystemContactPicker`. Wraps `Intent.ACTION_PICK` + `ContactsContract.CommonDataKinds.Phone.CONTENT_URI`. Result URI → Cursor → extracts raw displayName + phoneNumber. Returns `RawPickerContact` (not URI/Cursor — ACL boundary). Compile clean.
- **Files**: `core/src/androidMain/kotlin/com/launcher/adapters/contacts/SystemContactPickerAdapter.kt`.
- **Dependencies**: requires T017.

### T063 [P] Implement `OpenAppDispatcherAndroid` (queryIntentActivities + fallback chain)

- **Trace**: FR-035, FR-035a, plan.md §2.
- **Acceptance**: extends existing OpenAppDispatcher с реальной реализацией: (1) `packageManager.queryIntentActivities(Intent(ACTION_MAIN).addCategory(LAUNCHER).setPackage(packageName))` — НЕ `getPackageInfo()` per FR-035a. (2) Если найдено — startActivity launcher intent → returns Launched. (3) Иначе `Intent(ACTION_VIEW, Uri.parse("market://details?id=$pkg"))` — если resolvable → OpenedPlayStore. (4) Web fallback `https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=$pkg` → OpenedWebPlayStore. (5) Все упали → FailedAll. **Inline-TODO**: `// TODO(spec-followup): web fallback нужен для не-GMS Huawei devices.`
- **Files**: `core/src/androidMain/kotlin/com/launcher/adapters/apps/OpenAppDispatcherAndroid.kt`.
- **Dependencies**: requires T019.

### T064 [P] Implement `InstalledAppsCatalogAdapter` (PackageManager → sorted list, own app filtered)

- **Trace**: FR-034.
- **Acceptance**: `class InstalledAppsCatalogAdapter(context: Context) : InstalledAppsCatalog`. Uses `packageManager.queryIntentActivities(Intent(ACTION_MAIN).addCategory(LAUNCHER), 0)`. Filters out own package (`context.packageName`). Sorts by `label` (locale-aware `Collator`). Returns `InstalledApp` projections. Compile clean.
- **Files**: `core/src/androidMain/kotlin/com/launcher/adapters/apps/InstalledAppsCatalogAdapter.kt`.
- **Dependencies**: requires T016.

### T065 [CRIT] Implement `FirestoreConfigHistoryAdapter` (write/read/housekeep)

- **Trace**: FR-037, FR-038, FR-045a, [contracts/config-history.md](contracts/config-history.md).
- **Acceptance**: `class FirestoreConfigHistoryAdapter(firestore: FirebaseFirestore) : ConfigHistoryRepository`.
  - `recordSnapshot` writes to `/links/{linkId}/config/history/{autoId}` with `recordedFromDeviceId = currentAuthUid` (so FR-045a Rule passes).
  - `readAll` queries collection orderBy `recordedAt` DESC.
  - `housekeep` reads all, if >`retentionCount`, deletes oldest до остатка retentionCount (client-orchestrated; **inline-TODO** `// TODO(server-roadmap SRV-CONFIG-002): housekeeping → server cron.`).
  - Error mapping: FirebaseFirestoreException → RepositoryError sealed.
- **Files**: `core/src/androidMain/kotlin/com/launcher/adapters/history/FirestoreConfigHistoryAdapter.kt`.
- **Dependencies**: requires T015, T011.

### T066 [P] Test: `FirestoreConfigHistoryAdapterTest` (against Firebase emulator)

- **Trace**: FR-037, FR-038.
- **Acceptance**: 4 tests с Firebase emulator:
  - `recordSnapshot_persists_to_subcollection`.
  - `readAll_returns_DESC_sorted`.
  - `housekeep_deletes_oldest_above_retention`.
  - `housekeep_idempotent_below_retention`.
- **Files**: `core/src/androidRealBackendUnitTest/kotlin/com/launcher/adapters/history/FirestoreConfigHistoryAdapterTest.kt`.
- **Dependencies**: requires T065.

### T067 DI override: register real adapters в androidMain (release flavour)

- **Trace**: T055 DI baseline.
- **Acceptance**: `core/src/androidMain/.../di/AdminPortsAndroidModule.kt` overrides DiModule bindings: real adapter per port. Build all flavours green; debug still uses fakes.
- **Files**: `core/src/androidMain/kotlin/com/launcher/di/AdminPortsAndroidModule.kt`.
- **Dependencies**: requires T060, T062, T063, T064, T065.

**Checkpoint Phase 5**: All 5 real adapters implemented; emulator tests green; DI overrides wired. Ready для UI integration в Phase 7+.

## Phase 6 — Security Rules + Manifest finalization

**Goal**: Финализировать Firestore Rules + AndroidManifest. Без этих файлов FR-027/035a/044/045 не работают.

### T070 [CRIT] Finalize `firestore.rules` subcollection rules for `/config/history/*`

- **Trace**: FR-044, FR-045, FR-045b, plan.md §10 Phase 1.
- **Acceptance**: extend T006 draft в финальный rule блок. Read allowed для `adminId == request.auth.uid || managedDeviceFirebaseUid == request.auth.uid`. Create allowed same. Update/Delete denied для всех. **Subcollection explicit** (no inheritance assumption). `firebase deploy --only firestore:rules` или emulator load succeeds.
- **Files**: `firestore.rules`.
- **Dependencies**: requires T006.

### T071 [P] [CRIT] Add field-level constraint `recordedFromDeviceId == request.auth.uid` (FR-045a)

- **Trace**: FR-045a anti-spoofing.
- **Acceptance**: rules `allow create: if ... && request.resource.data.recordedFromDeviceId == request.auth.uid;`. Без этого клиент-spoofing возможен.
- **Files**: `firestore.rules` (same file as T070).
- **Dependencies**: requires T070.

### T072 [P] Test: `firestore-tests/config-history-rules.spec.ts` — 5 emulator tests

- **Trace**: FR-044/045/045a/045b verification.
- **Acceptance**: 5 tests в emulator:
  - `admin_writes_with_own_uid_OK`.
  - `admin_writes_with_spoofed_managed_uid_DENIED` (FR-045a anti-spoof).
  - `foreign_uid_DENIED`.
  - `update_DENIED_for_history_immutability`.
  - `both_editors_can_read_all_history` (FR-042 symmetry).
- **Files**: `firestore-tests/config-history-rules.spec.ts`.
- **Dependencies**: requires T070, T071.

### T073 [P] AndroidManifest: add VCard `<intent-filter>` + `launchMode="singleTask"` (FR-027a)

- **Trace**: FR-027, FR-027a.
- **Acceptance**: `<activity android:name=".contacts.VCardReceiveActivity" android:launchMode="singleTask" android:exported="true">` + `<intent-filter><action android:name="android.intent.action.SEND"/><category android:name="android.intent.category.DEFAULT"/><data android:mimeType="text/x-vcard"/></intent-filter>`. Build green; VCardReceiveActivity скелет создаётся в T080.
- **Files**: `app/src/main/AndroidManifest.xml`.

### T074 [P] AndroidManifest: add `READ_CONTACTS` permission (admin-only flavour)

- **Trace**: FR-023, plan.md §5.
- **Acceptance**: `<uses-permission android:name="android.permission.READ_CONTACTS"/>` добавлено. Build green. Permission запрашивается runtime через T081, не declared = denied.
- **Files**: `app/src/main/AndroidManifest.xml`.

### T075 [P] Create `data_extraction_rules.xml` resource (Room contacts DB exclusion — FR-046a)

- **Trace**: FR-046a, plan.md §5, GDPR transfer-to-processor compliance.
- **Acceptance**: `app/src/main/res/xml/data_extraction_rules.xml` содержит:
  ```xml
  <data-extraction-rules>
      <cloud-backup>
          <exclude domain="database" path="contacts-db"/>
          <exclude domain="database" path="config_sync.db"/>
      </cloud-backup>
      <device-transfer>
          <exclude domain="database" path="contacts-db"/>
      </device-transfer>
  </data-extraction-rules>
  ```
  Replaces placeholder из T005. Build green.
- **Files**: `app/src/main/res/xml/data_extraction_rules.xml`.
- **Dependencies**: requires T005.

### T076 [P] Configure history housekeeping bypass: delete-old via privileged client path

- **Trace**: FR-038, T070 update/delete denied policy reconciliation.
- **Acceptance**: housekeeping path (T065) использует Firebase Auth UID того editor'a, который сделал push. Rules update (T070): `allow delete: if (adminId == request.auth.uid || managedDeviceFirebaseUid == request.auth.uid) && resource.data.snapshotSchemaVersion <= 1;` — allows housekeeping delete by editors. **Inline-TODO** `// TODO(SRV-CONFIG-002): server cron заменит client housekeeping; delete rule станет server-only.` Emulator test `editor_can_delete_old_snapshot_during_housekeeping_OK` green.
- **Files**: `firestore.rules`, `firestore-tests/config-history-rules.spec.ts` (extend).
- **Dependencies**: requires T070, T065.

**Checkpoint Phase 6**: All infra rules + manifest finalized; 6 emulator security tests green; backup exclusion in place.

## Phase 10 — Contacts flows

**Goal**: System picker + permission flows + VCard share intent + manual entry + privacy minimum + NFR-002 microbenchmark.

### T110 [P] [CRIT] `ContactPickerLauncher` — Activity Result Contract for system picker

- **Trace**: FR-024.
- **Acceptance**: `ContactPickerLauncher` Composable wrapping `rememberLauncherForActivityResult(PickContact())`. Returns URI → проходит через `SystemContactPickerAdapter` (T062) → `RawPickerContact`.
- **Files**: `app/src/main/kotlin/com/launcher/app/contacts/ContactPickerLauncher.kt`.
- **Dependencies**: requires T062.

### T111 [P] READ_CONTACTS permission request + rationale screen (FR-023)

- **Trace**: FR-023.
- **Acceptance**: `ContactPermissionRationaleScreen` Composable — explanation text per FR-033c: «Контакты, которые вы добавите, сохраняются в облаке Firebase и видны на устройстве вашего родственника. Вы можете удалить их в любой момент через Settings → Добавленные контакты». «Дать разрешение» button → `ActivityResultContracts.RequestPermission(Manifest.permission.READ_CONTACTS)`. Granted → continues to ContactPickerLauncher. Denied → routes to T112.
- **Files**: `app/src/main/kotlin/com/launcher/app/contacts/ContactPermissionRationale.kt`.
- **Dependencies**: requires T074.

### T112 [P] `ManualContactEntryForm` — alternative when denied (FR-023a)

- **Trace**: FR-023a alternative 1.
- **Acceptance**: Composable с TextField для displayName + phoneNumber. На «Сохранить» → `Contact.fromRaw(name, phone)` — same domain validator as picker (FR-026). ValidationError → inline error message.
- **Files**: `app/src/main/kotlin/com/launcher/app/contacts/ManualContactEntryForm.kt`.
- **Dependencies**: requires T010.

### T113 [P] Permission denied → informational banner про VCard share alternative (FR-023a)

- **Trace**: FR-023a alternative 2 banner.
- **Acceptance**: после первого отказа в permission — banner «Вы также можете добавлять контакты, делясь ими из WhatsApp / Telegram / других мессенджеров — для этого разрешение на чтение контактов не нужно». Static text + «(?)» tooltip далее.
- **Files**: same `ContactPermissionRationale.kt` (extend).

### T114 [P] Permission permanently denied → deep-link to settings (FR-023b)

- **Trace**: FR-023b.
- **Acceptance**: button «Открыть настройки приложения» → `Intent(Settings.ACTION_APPLICATION_DETAILS_SETTINGS, Uri.fromParts("package", context.packageName, null))`. Видна только когда `shouldShowRequestPermissionRationale == false` AND user уже денайнул хотя бы раз.
- **Files**: same `ContactPermissionRationale.kt` (extend).

### T115 [P] Multiple phone numbers dialog (FR-025)

- **Trace**: FR-025.
- **Acceptance**: если `RawPickerContact.phoneNumbers.size > 1` → DialogPicker «Какой номер использовать: мобильный +X / домашний +Y» (фактически только номер, type label не извлекаем в спеке 9). User selects → propagates к TileEditForm.
- **Files**: `app/src/main/kotlin/com/launcher/app/contacts/PhoneNumberPickerDialog.kt`.

### T116 [P] Deduplicate logic — match by phoneNumber only (FR-033)

- **Trace**: FR-033 (строгое phoneNumber match).
- **Acceptance**: `ContactDeduplicator.findExisting(phone, contacts: List<Contact>): Contact?` — pure-Kotlin function в `core/api/config/`. Used by EditorViewModel перед creation: если existing → reuse Contact.id для нового Slot. Тест `ContactDeduplicatorTest`.
- **Files**: `core/src/commonMain/kotlin/com/launcher/api/config/ContactDeduplicator.kt`, test.

### T117 [CRIT] `VCardReceiveActivity` — singleTask + onNewIntent (FR-027a)

- **Trace**: FR-027, FR-027a, plan.md §2 data flow US-4.
- **Acceptance**: Activity с `launchMode="singleTask"` (manifest T073). `onCreate` + `onNewIntent` обе вызывают `handleVCardIntent(intent)`. Handler: `intent.extras.get(Intent.EXTRA_STREAM)` → ByteArray → `VCardImportAdapter.parse(bytes)` (T060) → success → переходит на picker Managed screen (T118); failure → toast «Не удалось добавить контакт». Compile + Manifest registration green.
- **Files**: `app/src/main/kotlin/com/launcher/app/contacts/VCardReceiveActivity.kt`.
- **Dependencies**: requires T060, T073.

### T118 [P] Picker for Managed selection if > 1 (FR-029)

- **Trace**: FR-029.
- **Acceptance**: Composable `ManagedDevicePickerScreen` показывает list paired Managed. Preselect единственный если >1=false. Tap → propagates к T119.
- **Files**: `app/src/main/kotlin/com/launcher/app/contacts/ManagedDevicePickerScreen.kt`.

### T119 [P] Transition to EditorScreen with prefilled tile (FR-030)

- **Trace**: FR-030.
- **Acceptance**: navigation: VCardReceiveActivity → ManagedDevicePicker → EditorScreen(linkId, draftSeed = Contact). EditorViewModel принимает `draftSeed: Contact?` constructor param — creates Slot draft в активной flow с этим Contact prefilled.
- **Files**: extend EditorViewModel + navigation graph.
- **Dependencies**: requires T096, T118.

### T120 [P] `ContactsManageScreen` privacy minimum (FR-033a/b/c)

- **Trace**: FR-033a, FR-033b (немедленное deletion), FR-033c (расширенный rationale text).
- **Acceptance**: Composable список всех Contact'ов group by Managed. Каждый: name + phone + Delete button. Delete → confirm dialog → `EditorViewModel.deleteContactFromConfig(linkId, contactId)` → push (FR-033b немедленное) + offline → pending. Linked Slots tоже удаляются (FR-033a).
- **Files**: `app/src/main/kotlin/com/launcher/app/admin/ContactsManageScreen.kt`.

### T121 [P] [CRIT] NFR-002 microbenchmark — VCard parse < 100ms p95

- **Trace**: NFR-002, plan.md §6.
- **Acceptance**: microbenchmark в `core/src/androidBenchmark/.../VCardParserBenchmark.kt`. Input: 10 KB synthetic VCard (max boundary). Runs on `Dispatchers.Default`. Asserts p95 < 100ms.
- **Files**: `core/src/androidBenchmark/kotlin/com/launcher/benchmark/VCardParserBenchmark.kt`.
- **Dependencies**: requires T060.

**Checkpoint Phase 10**: Contacts flows complete; US-3 + US-4 demonstrable; SC-003 ≤ 60 sec verifiable; privacy minimum landed; NFR-002 gated.

## Phase 11 — History + rollback

**Goal**: HistoryScreen (отдельный полноэкранный), preview, rollback flow, FR-042 symmetry, FR-043 schema validation.

### T125 [CRIT] Create `HistoryScreen` отдельный полноэкранный screen (FR-039)

- **Trace**: FR-039 (Q-OPEN-1 resolved: full screen, not bottom sheet).
- **Acceptance**: Composable `HistoryScreen(linkId)`. Navigation: EditorScreen «···» menu → «История» → push HistoryScreen. Full-screen with top bar «История раскладки» + back button.
- **Files**: `app/src/main/kotlin/com/launcher/app/admin/HistoryScreen.kt`.

### T126 [P] Snapshot list rendering — sorted by recordedAt DESC, current badge

- **Trace**: FR-039.
- **Acceptance**: HistoryViewModel reads `ConfigHistoryRepository.readAll(linkId)` + computes current via comparing `config.serverUpdatedAt` с `EditorState.applied.serverUpdatedAt`. Each row: date+time (locale-aware) + recordedFromDeviceId + «текущая» bаdge для current. Tap → T127 preview.
- **Files**: `app/src/main/kotlin/com/launcher/app/admin/HistoryViewModel.kt`, list composable.
- **Dependencies**: requires T015, T065.

### T127 [P] Snapshot preview (read-only EditorScreen mode) (FR-040)

- **Trace**: FR-040 (read-only preview).
- **Acceptance**: Tap snapshot → opens EditorScreen с `mode = AdminEditorMode.View` + draft = snapshot.config. Все edit-actions disabled. Bottom — кнопка «Откатить к этой версии» (T128).
- **Files**: extend EditorScreen + EditorViewModel.
- **Dependencies**: requires T094.

### T128 [P] Rollback button + confirmation dialog (FR-041)

- **Trace**: FR-041.
- **Acceptance**: «Откатить к этой версии» → confirm dialog «Это создаст новую запись в истории с этой раскладкой» → confirm → T129.
- **Files**: `app/src/main/kotlin/com/launcher/app/admin/RollbackConfirmDialog.kt`.

### T129 [P] [CRIT] Rollback execution = new push через spec 8 flow (FR-041)

- **Trace**: FR-041 (rollback = standard push).
- **Acceptance**: `HistoryViewModel.rollback(snapshot)` копирует snapshot.config → ConfigPublishUseCase (спек 8) с current `clientSnapshotUpdatedAt`. Conflict → Merge UI спека 8 FR-050 (no special-casing). Success → старый current уходит в history (FR-037 standard) + applied updated.
- **Files**: same HistoryViewModel.
- **Dependencies**: requires T127.

### T130 [P] Schema validation на read — fail closed if forward incompat (FR-043)

- **Trace**: FR-043.
- **Acceptance**: `HistoryViewModel` фильтрует snapshots: каждый прогоняется через `SnapshotMigrator.migrate(toVersion=1)` (T030). Если returns `MigrationError.UnsupportedVersion` → snapshot показывается, но disabled с пометкой «Слишком новая версия — откат невозможен» (forward-compat fail-closed).
- **Files**: same HistoryViewModel.
- **Dependencies**: requires T030.

### T131 [P] Old `schemaVersion` UI lock с пояснением «too old to restore» (FR-043)

- **Trace**: FR-043 (lazy transformer absent в спеке 9 = lock).
- **Acceptance**: если `snapshot.config.schemaVersion < CURRENT_CODE_SUPPORT` → snapshot disabled с пометкой «Эта версия несовместима с текущим приложением — нужен транзформер (TODO-ARCH-015)». В спеке 9 `schemaVersion = 1` для всех → не triggers; reserves UI для будущих spec'ов.
- **Files**: same HistoryViewModel.

### T132 [P] History symmetry — Managed-editor access via Settings 7-tap (FR-042, US-6)

- **Trace**: FR-042, US-6.
- **Acceptance**: existing Settings screen (спек 5) — добавляется entry «Редактировать раскладку» (только после 7-tap+password gate). Tap → опeнs `EditorScreen(linkId = ownLinkId, mode = Edit)`. Same EditorScreen / HistoryScreen reused (symmetry).
- **Files**: extend Settings UI (existing file).

**Checkpoint Phase 11**: History + rollback E2E; US-5 + US-6 demonstrable; SC-004 ≤ 60 sec verifiable.

- **Acceptance**: real assertion replaces T007 scaffold. Konsist DSL: `Konsist.scopeFromProject().files.withPackage("com.launcher.api.contacts").assertFalse { it.hasImport { import -> import.name.startsWith("android.") || import.name.startsWith("androidx.") } }`. Fails build on violation.

## Что внутри (TL;DR на русском)

Это **разбивка плана** спека 9 (admin-режим) на ~108 конкретных задач T001..T167 (с гэпами) в 14 фазах. Каждая задача — одна логическая единица < 1 day, < 5 файлов, с явной привязкой к требованию (FR/NFR/US) и проверяемым acceptance criterion.

**Общий объём:**
- ~108 задач (с разрывами в номерах — T001..T008, T010..T020, T025..T030, T034..T043, T050..T055, T060..T067, T070..T076, T080..T086, T090..T098, T100..T107, T110..T121, T125..T132, T140..T144, T150..T158, T160..T167).
- 14 фаз × средняя длительность 0.5 недели = **~8 недель** (consistent с plan.md rollout).
- 24 задачи `[CRIT]` (критический путь) + множество `[P]` (parallel-safe).
- 9 manual `[M]` задач (TalkBack walkthrough, OEM matrix, smokes, coordination).

**Ключевые зависимости (что блокирует что):**
- **Phase 0 → всё остальное**: без TODO-ARCH-006 R8 верификации (T001) и без spec 8 merged (T002) — стартовать нельзя.
- **Phase 1 → 3, 4, 5**: domain types и ports должны существовать до contract tests, fakes и real adapters.
- **Phase 5 → 7, 10, 11, 12**: real adapters нужны для всех UI surfaces.
- **Phase 6 → 11**: Security Rules нужны до history rollback в production.
- **Phase 8 → 9**: editor scaffold должен быть готов до drag-and-drop overlay.
- **Phase 9 → 14**: NFR-001 macrobenchmark gate (T106) — критический gate перед merge.
- **Phase 10 → 14**: NFR-002 microbenchmark gate (T121) — критический gate перед merge.
- **Phase 13 → 14**: Konsist gates должны проходить до final speckit-analyze.

**Ключевые gates (must pass перед merge):**
- 10 contract tests (Phase 3) — wire-format integrity.
- 5 Konsist gates (Phase 13) — domain isolation per CLAUDE.md rules 1 + 2.
- NFR-001 macrobenchmark — drag-and-drop p99 < 16ms (T106).
- NFR-002 microbenchmark — VCard parse p95 < 100ms (T121).
- 5 emulator security tests (T072) — anti-spoofing + subcollection rules.
- Manual TalkBack walkthrough (T160).
- Manual elderly walkthrough (T161).
- Manual OEM matrix (T162).
- speckit-analyze final pass (T166).

**Порядок имплементации (рекомендуемый):**

1. **Phase 0** (1-2 дня) — preflight, coordination, manifest baseline, Konsist scaffold, PR opened.
2. **Phases 1–2** (3-4 дня) — domain types + ports + UI types compile. Foundation для всего.
3. **Phase 3** (2-3 дня) — 10 contract tests. Wire-format gate satisfied.
4. **Phase 4** (1-2 дня) — fakes + DI. Mock-first unblocks UI dev.
5. **Phase 5** (1 неделя) — real adapters (Firebase, parser, picker, package manager).
6. **Phase 6** (2 дня) — Security Rules + manifest final.
7. **Phase 7** (3-5 дней) — phone health UI (US-2 demonstrable).
8. **Phase 8** (1 неделя) — editor scaffold (US-1, US-6 demonstrable).
9. **Phase 9** (1 неделя) — drag-and-drop + NFR-001 gate.
10. **Phase 10** (1 неделя) — contacts flows + NFR-002 gate (US-3, US-4 demonstrable).
11. **Phase 11** (3-5 дней) — history + rollback (US-5 demonstrable).
12. **Phase 12** (2 дня) — OpenApp tiles (US-7 demonstrable).
13. **Phase 13** (2 дня) — Konsist + cleanup + docs.
14. **Phase 14** (3-5 дней) — smokes + perf-checkpoint + final speckit-analyze + merge.

**Constraints на реализацию** (зафиксированы plan.md §11, прокинуты в задачи):
- C-1: NO EventBus framework — T029 emits через single `MutableSharedFlow`.
- C-2: NO generic `TransformerRegistry` — T030 explicit `when (fromVersion)` chain.
- C-3: Inline-TODO exit-ramp в forward-compat data classes — T012, T013, T027, T029.
- C-4: `PhoneHealthIndicator` placement final = `:core/commonMain/ui/health/` (НЕ `app/`) — T026.
- C-5: `SeverityWire` (wire) vs `PhoneHealthSeverity` (UI) — два enum'а — T013 vs T025.

**Что прокидывается в backlog (не в этот спек, но связано):**
- TODO-LEGAL-001 (privacy compliance) — 🚨 PLAY-STORE-BLOCKER, отложено в backlog.
- TODO-ARCH-006 (R8 minification) — 🚨 PLAY-STORE-BLOCKER, верифицируется в T001.
- TODO-ARCH-010..015 (configurable thresholds, named presets, schema transformers) — backlog.
- SRV-CONFIG-001 (server-side history writes), SRV-CONFIG-002 (server cron housekeeping), SRV-MONITOR-001 (push admin on Critical) — server-roadmap.

**Размер файла**: ~1100 строк (consistent с tasks.md спека 008 — 1005 строк).

**Следующий шаг**: после генерации этого tasks.md — `/speckit.analyze` (cross-artifact final verification) → имплементация по фазам с push-после-каждой-значимой-задачи (CLAUDE.md §Branching).
